Methods

ConsentDenied(string, IEnumerable<string>)

Helper method to increase Consent counter. The scopes are expanded and called one by one to not cause a combinatory explosion of scopes.

public static void ConsentDenied(string clientId, IEnumerable<string> scopes)

Parameters

clientId string

Client id

scopes IEnumerable<string>

Scope names. Each element is added on it's own to the counter

ConsentGranted(string, IEnumerable<string>, bool)

Helper method to increase Consent counter. The scopes are expanded and called one by one to not cause a combinatory explosion of scopes.

public static void ConsentGranted(string clientId, IEnumerable<string> scopes, bool remember)

Parameters

clientId string

Client id

scopes IEnumerable<string>

Scope names. Each element is added on it's own to the counter

remember bool

Remember consent granted

GrantsRevoked(string?)

Helper method to increase the GrantsRevoked counter.

public static void GrantsRevoked(string? clientId)

Parameters

clientId string

Client id to revoke for, or null for all.

UserLogin(string?, string)

Helper method to increase UserLogin counter.

public static void UserLogin(string? clientId, string idp)

Parameters

clientId string

Client Id, if available

idp string

Identity provider

UserLoginFailure(string?, string, string)

Helper method to increase UserLogin counter on failure.

public static void UserLoginFailure(string? clientId, string idp, string error)

Parameters

clientId string

Client Id, if available

idp string

Identity provider

error string

Error message

UserLogout(string?)

Helper method to increase the UserLogout counter.

public static void UserLogout(string? idp)

Parameters

idp string

Idp/authentication scheme for external authentication, or "local" for built in.
